overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 depicting a Space Marine in blue power armor battling Tyranid aliens across a devastated gothic industrial wasteland. The character engages in intense melee and ranged combat on elevated metal platforms, traverses dark interior corridors with allied marines, and emerges to climb ruined staircases overlooking massive industrial cathedrals.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial platform with Tyranid infestation

events.description: engaging Tyranid swarm with chainsword melee attacks
executing heavy melee strike on larger Tyranid warrior
moving toward building entrance while clearing remaining enemies

agents.ego_description: fighting Tyranid aliens with chainsword and bolter on a blood-stained metal platform

notable_agents.action: Tyranid warrior attacking with claws and tentacles
large Tyranid creature lurking near spawning pools

entered.detail: blood-stained industrial metal flooring with drainage grates
massive crumbling stone and metal structures with arched windows
organic alien biomass and hive structures pulsating with red tendrils
large rusted pipes and conduits running along platform edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial platform covered in blood and alien biomass. The Space Marine engages in frantic combat with Tyranid creatures, using a chainsword to dispatch smaller swarms while a larger warrior lurks in the background near grotesque spawning pools. Gothic cathedral ruins loom in the distance under an overcast sky.

events.description: entering industrial building through heavy metal doors
transition from natural outdoor light to dim artificial interior lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the fortified structure alongside allied Space Marines

notable_agents.action: allied Space Marine standing guard at the entrance door

entered.detail: metal bulkheads with exposed wiring and hazard stripes
heavy blast door decorated with Imperial skull insignia and yellow-black stripes
bundled cables and ventilation ducts running overhead
yellow warning beacons casting dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open platform into a narrow industrial corridor. The heavy metal door with skull insignia marks the entrance to the bunker. Inside, dim emergency lights illuminate blood-stained floors while allied Space Marines stand guard. The transition from the chaotic outdoor battlefield to the enclosed interior is marked by a significant drop in lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated ruins with view of industrial complex

events.description: exiting building into open ruins and beginning ascent
climbing stone stairs toward higher elevation
collecting ammunition and grenades from supply crates

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and moving through elevated ruins while surveying the devastated landscape

entered.detail: worn stone steps with metal railings leading upward
gigantic gothic structure with smokestacks and spires
dark smoke rising from distant fires
yellow and black supply boxes with grenade pickups

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bunker, the scene opens onto elevated ruins with a massive industrial cathedral dominating the skyline. The character ascends worn stone stairs, passing ammunition crates while dark smoke plumes rise in the distance. The environment shifts from enclosed corridors to an expansive overlook of the devastated gothic cityscape.

events.description: picking up frag grenades from supply cache
acquiring krak grenades from weapons crate

agents.ego_description: traversing elevated walkways and bridges while collecting equipment and surveying the battlefield

entered.detail: collapsed metal walkway with missing sections over deep chasm
glowing equipment cache on the ground
expansive view of ongoing combat and destruction

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on a precarious elevated bridge with sections collapsed into the chasm below. The character collects frag and krak grenades from supply caches while moving across the ruined walkway. The massive industrial cathedral remains visible in the background as the camera surveys the extensive battlefield damage stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic, blood-soaked battlefield into a claustrophobic bunker before emerging onto an expansive overlook of a ruined gothic city. It begins on a wide industrial platform where a Space Marine battles Tyranid swarms amidst grotesque spawning pools and distant cathedral ruins under an overcast sky. As the combat concludes, the camera follows the character through a skull-insignia door into a narrow industrial corridor, where the lighting drops sharply to dim emergency glows and blood-stained floors. The scene then opens as the character exits the bunker and ascends worn stone stairs, shifting from the enclosed interior to a vast vista dominated by a massive industrial cathedral and rising plumes of dark smoke. Finally, the movement leads across a precarious, collapsed elevated bridge where the character gathers munitions while surveying the extensive battlefield damage stretching toward the horizon.
